1.6.0: Improved tab and app bar interaction behavior.
1.7.0: More compact controls and settings presentation.
Improved consistency across dialogs and overlays.
1.7.1: Stability improvements for tabs, history, and URL interactions.
Updated visuals across key in-app surfaces.
1.8.1: Favicon safety with DNS-aware private/local IP blocking.
1.9.0: Added offline indicator when internet connection is lost.
1.10.1: Signing metadata is now up to date.
1.10.2: Removed hover effects and refined keyboard shortcuts.
1.10.3: Guarded iOS until the Info.plist names camera and mic.
1.12.0: Implement user profiles feature for browser.
1.14.0: Settings polish and URL privacy option.
1.14.1: Improve release automation and bump stability.
1.14.4: include whatsnew.json generation to version bump workflow.
1.14.5: cross-platform sed compatibility to pubspec version script.
1.15.0: include clear data controls and macos activation.
1.15.1: reset home tab title and sync flutter toolchain.
1.15.2: improve macOS local file loading with WebKit-specific implementation.
1.15.3: GitHub action to suggest similar issues on new submissions.
1.15.4: simplify issue similarity search using gh CLI instead of API.
1.15.5: replace keyword search with Python-based similarity scoring for issue matching.
1.15.6: use temporary files instead of shell variables for issue similarity data.
1.15.7: case-insensitive state filtering and empty results handling in issue similarity.
1.15.8: remove unused rebuild key from BrowserPage.
1.15.9: replace inline shell/Python script with libnudget/echo action for issue similarity.
1.15.10: extract bump-version inline scripts to separate shell files.
1.15.11: replace local bump-version action with libnudget/bump@main.
1.15.13: improve url tracking for google login and youtube.
1.15.14: replace inline auto-label script with libnudget actions.
1.16.1: prevent unwanted initial page focus on buttons.
1.17.0: include auto-update service with github releases integration.
1.17.1: redesign update dialog with improved layout and integrate kilocode plugin dependency.
1.17.2: implement iOS CocoaPods integration with Firebase and Flutter plugins.
1.17.3: disable ambient animation and limit theme probe to prevent macOS hover flicker.
1.17.4: bump Flutter version to 3.41.7 across workflows.
1.17.5: validate Google favicon URLs before rendering to prevent broken icons.
1.17.6: improve volume path parsing to handle multiline mount output.
1.18.0: include namespaced password storage with resilient secure/plaintext fallback.
1.18.1: extend auto-label workflow to trigger on issue opens.
1.18.2: use ditto instead of cp -R for app installation.
1.18.3: include cross-platform fullscreen support for web content via JS bridge and Android custom widget.
1.19.0: extend auto-label workflow to trigger on issue reopens.
1.19.1: include contents: read permission to auto-label workflow.
1.20.0: include GHTOKEN env var in auto-label workflow.
1.20.1: remove GHTOKEN env var from auto-label workflow.
1.20.2: remove contents: read permission from auto-label workflow.
1.21.0: include animated refresh icon and update badge to settings update checker.
1.22.0: include mute toggle and media detection for active browser tab.
1.22.1: replace polling media detection with JS bridge-driven playback state and mute sync.
1.22.2: replace CompositedTransformFollower with Positioned for URL autocomplete overlay placement.
1.23.0: include macOS menu bar status item with show/hide/quit controls and background window support.
1.24.0: enable app-sandbox entitlement for debug, profile, and release builds.
1.25.0: enable user-selected file read-write entitlement for debug, profile, and release builds.
1.26.0: replace app icon with dedicated template image for menu bar status item.
1.26.1: resolve navigation URL from pending state to prevent stale address bar during cross-site transitions.
1.26.2: strip excess entitlements and rename custom module from browser to Runner.
1.26.3: include help button to settings dialog linking to features page.
1.26.4: include GitLab back fallback to handle broken history navigation from about.gitlab.com.
1.27.0: increase ambient toolbar opacity and include glow shadow on scroll.
1.27.1: include TitleChangeChannel and MutationObserver to capture dynamic page title updates.
1.28.0: redesign AI chat as ambient-aware floating panel with bubble layout, starter prompts, and animated transitions.
1.28.1: implement native JavaScript alert, confirm, and prompt dialog handlers with host-aware titles.
1.28.2: remove stale WebKit workaround and restore home back behavior.
